comment.body:
so in this first backtest, i fetched all the weekly and daily posts, and the centroid, upside pivot and downside pivot levels. only. 
(so reversion levels are not included)
the backtest is based on daily OHLC for now and it has accounted for volatility for margin of error.
the more prcise 5min based backtest will come too. i'm working on it
result:

Mean combined accuracy: 60.27%
Median combined accuracy: 58.33%
95% bootstrap CI to the mean: 57.62% – 62.94%
Ratio above 50%: 55.81%
Ratio above 75%: 27.91%
comment.raw_body:
so in this first backtest, i fetched all the weekly and daily posts, and the centroid, upside pivot and downside pivot levels. only. 
(so reversion levels are not included)
the backtest is based on daily OHLC for now and it has accounted for volatility for margin of error.
the more prcise 5min based backtest will come too. i'm working on it
result:

Mean combined accuracy: 60.27%
Median combined accuracy: 58.33%
95% bootstrap CI to the mean: 57.62% – 62.94%
Ratio above 50%: 55.81%
Ratio above 75%: 27.91%
